titles.romaji: Wo De Shixiong Tai Qiang Le
synonyms: My Senior Brother is Too Strong
พอดีข้ามีศิษย์พี่โคตรเทพ
titles.tmdb_title: My Senior Brother is Too Strong

description: Cultivator Lv Shaoqing’s accidental acquisition of the immortal treasure “Spring and Autumn Ring” led the righteous immortal alliance to label him as a world-destroying demon and hunt him to death. But by some strange twist of fate, he was sent back a thousand years in time and found himself sharing a body with the very enemy who had killed him. Trapped within the enemy's lair, Lv Shaoqing fought wits and courage to reclaim control of the body for survival as well as anticipating the enemy’s actions to collect rare treasures. Eventually, through his remarkable intelligence and courage, Lv Shaoqing became the most despised playboy of the righteous path. At the same time, the hidden secrets of the cultivation world began to come to light. Lv Shaoqing counted with his fingers, and suddenly realized that the course of history had already been changed!
